<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This workspace contains a Flutter frontend and a Python Flask backend for a mobile authentication app. The backend uses MongoDB and JWT authentication. The frontend should use Provider for state management and follow modern Material Design principles.
